message:
fix(tui): sync coach hints with actual keybindings, add drift-detection tests (br-1xt0m.1.12.3)

Fix two coach hint messages that referenced keys not in screen keybindings:
- agents:inbox — referenced Enter (not bound), now references / and s
- projects:browse — referenced Enter (not bound), now references / and s

Add two auto-synchronization tests:
- coach_hints_reference_valid_keys: validates hint key references against
  screen keybindings + GLOBAL_BINDINGS (catches future drift)
- context_help_tips_cover_all_screens: ensures every screen provides a
  non-empty context_help_tip() for the help overlay

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
